scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "cross-env PORT=5173 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/wedding-app run dev"
scripts.dev:homolog: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "cross-env APP_BASE_PATH= pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "cross-env PORT=5173 BASE_PATH=/casamento360/ pnpm --filter @workspace/wedding-app run dev"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:homolog: pnpm run typecheck && cross-env BASE_PATH=/casamento360/ PORT=5173 pnpm --filter @workspace/wedding-app run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
